18 Ogos 2021
18 August 2021
FEDERAL GOVERNMENT
GAZETTE
COMPANIES (AMENDMENT) REGULATIONS 2021 |
1. (1) These regulations may be cited as the Companies (Amendment)
(2) These Regulations come into operation on 19 August 2021.

2. The Companies Regulations 2017 [P.U. (A) 37/ 2017] is amended in the Schedule-
(a) by inserting after item 32 and the particulars relating to it the following item
and particulars:
(1) (2) (3)

company under subsection 567(3) paid upon registration and
of the Act the prescribed fee payable
on the increase in share
capital under column (2)
of item 32";
(b) in relation to item 43, in column (2), by substituting for the words "relating to
company or corporation" the words "lodged under the Act";
(c) in relation to item 45, in column (2), by substituting for the words
"relating to company" the words "under the Act";
(d) in relation to item 47, in column (2), by inserting after the word "company"
the words ", shareholder, director, secretary, auditor or liquidator of any
company"; and
(e) in relation to item 48, in column (2), by inserting after the word "document"
the words "or application".
[KPDNKK.100-1/4/25; PN(PU2)740/III]
